title: From the field to code. Same rigor, new craft.
description: After 30 years in industry, I learned to develop applications. Today I publish them on the stores.
storyP1: I discovered development through Udemy Business. TOSA Python advanced certification, then mentored by a senior developer. I learned React Native, Swift and SwiftUI by building my own apps.
storyP2: Frame Picker is published on the Mac App Store, Verset Vie on iOS and Android. These aren't exercises — they're apps used daily by real users. I build yours with the same rigor.
aiNote: AI helps me code faster and better. But I'm the one who designs, develops and delivers.

benefits.title: Published apps
benefits.description: My apps are on the stores. Proof by example, not just promises.

benefits.title: Turnkey
benefits.description: From design to publication, I handle everything. You get an app ready to use.

benefits.title: 3 months support included
benefits.description: An issue after delivery? I fix it, covered for 3 months. New features and updates available on request.

benefits.title: Quality code
benefits.description: AI-assisted, tested, best practices. Clean code that lasts.
